title: anthyllis sericea subsp. henoniana
intro: Anthyllis sericea subsp. henoniana, also known as the silky kidney-vetch, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Anthyllis sericea subsp. henoniana is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
